title: Rosewood Cyber Rubber Dental Bone for Dogs - Tough, Chew-Resistant Dog Toy - Non-Toxic Rubber - Supports Dental Health - Interactive Chewing and Play – Assorted Colours (1pc)
features: DURABLE, CHEW-RESISTANT DESIGN: Crafted from high quality rubber, this dental bone is part of Rosewood’s premium range of tough toys, made to withstand vigorous chewing
SUPPORTS DENTAL HEALTH: The textured surface of this toy helps to clean teeth and massage gums as your dog plays, chews and catches, supporting overall oral hygiene
GREAT FOR SOLO PLAY & TRAINING: Lightweight and easy to grip, this bone toy is great for independent play or as a fun reward during training
NON-TOXIC RUBBER: Manufactured from pet-safe rubber that’s free from harmful chemicals - giving you peace of mind while your dog plays and chews
VIBRANT ASSORTED COLOURS: Available in a variety of eye-catching colours (randomly selected), enhancing visibility during playtime
description: From the manufacturer Rosewood Here at Rosewood, we’ve been keeping dogs, cats, birds, rabbits, hamsters, fish in fact all sorts of pets happy for over half a century. That means sourcing and making top quality, great value products for retailers. We know that customers regard their pets not as animals, but as part of the family. We do, too. That’s how it should be. They’re pet parents, not just owners. That’s why we put so much effort into providing the very best, at the very best prices. From toys to treats to collars to bedding, our range is unsurpassed. We look for great ideas and top quality and where we can’t find it, we develop our own. Rosewood Rubber, Tough Chew Resistant, Bone Dog Toy, Assorted Colours Premium range of tough, chew resistant rubber toys with designs to offer dogs options to chew, chase, catch and tug whilst helping to clean teeth and gums.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Boredom Buster, Chewing, Mental Stimulation, Playing, Teething
